Document 7: Directs the Secretary of the Interior, acting through the Bureau of Land Management (BLM), to implement an expedited program to examine and determine the validity of each unpatented mining claim
within specified mining townsites.
Document 8: Amends the Military Construction Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2014 to provide that the withdrawal and reservation of public land located within the boundaries of the Naval Air Weapons Station China Lake
shall not terminate except pursuant to an election and determination by the Secretary of the Navy.
Document 9: Prohibits the Secretary of the Interior or the Secretary of Agriculture from prohibiting or restricting U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) activities on federal land
to execute search and rescue operations, and to prevent all unlawful entries into the United States.
Document 10: Requires Department of the Interior to relinquish all federal interests in certain lands surrounding Lake Bistineau
Makes December 8, 1842, the effective date of the relinquishment.
